title: Mining Cooldown Fix Updated
description: This is a port of the Mod Mining Cooldown Fix by covenantturtle, updated to 1.19
body:
# Mining Cooldown Fix Updated
This is a port of the mod Mining Cooldown Fix by covenantturtle, updated to Minecraft 1.19.

The mod allows you to break blocks without the hardcoded delay of 6 ticks inbetween breaks. 


CREDITS:
* covenantturtle, for creating the original mod.
https://modrinth.com/user/covenantturtle
